action.reasoning:
Observation: Best at epoch 24 was 0.0609 val exprate, eval gave 0.0509 on test. Need to continue training. ~100s/epoch, I have ~2.2h left = 7900s, 11 iters. Let me resume from best_last.pt for 50 more epochs with a fresh cosine schedule. That's ~5000s = 83 min. Then submit eval.

Decision: Resume training from best_last.pt with 50 more epochs (train.py uses --resume, but cosine schedule resets based on --epochs). Need to start with fresh cosine schedule since previous run ended. Use lower peak LR (1e-4) since we're fine-tuning.
action.command: cd /workspace && timeout 5400 python train.py --epochs 50 --resume checkpoints/best_last.pt --lr 2e-4 --out checkpoints/best.pt 2>&1 | tail -100
